title: asplenium viride subsp. jahandiezii
intro: Asplenium viride subsp. jahandiezii, also known as a species of fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It is a subtropical species with medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Asplenium viride subsp. jahandiezii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and calm respiratory tract irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
